headlines: Find the Root Cause of Your Symptoms
IHI — The IHI Way to True Health
Stop Treating Symptoms. Fix the Cause.
Dr. Trevor Miller DC IFMCP LAc
Hormones, Gut, Brain — We Treat All
North Vernon IN — Now Accepting Patients
descriptions: Tired of band-aid fixes? Dr. Miller uses advanced lab testing to find and fix the root cause of your health issues. Book today.
Combining functional medicine, chiropractic, and acupuncture — Integrated Health of Indiana treats the whole person, not just symptoms.
IHI's certified practitioners create personalized care plans using genetics, lab results, nutrition & lifestyle. North Vernon, IN.
From hormone imbalance to chronic fatigue and gut issues — we uncover why you feel this way and build a plan to fix it for good.

headlines: Back Pain & Joint Relief — No Surgery
descriptions: Shockwave therapy promotes healing of chronic tendons, muscles, and joints without surgery or drugs. Covered by most HSA/FSA plans.
Integrated Health of Indiana combines chiropractic care and shockwave therapy to relieve back pain, sciatica, and chronic joint issues.
FDA-cleared shockwave treatment used by elite athletes and everyday patients. Non-invasive, fast recovery, proven results. Book now.
Serving women with pelvic floor issues, plantar fasciitis, and soft tissue pain — shockwave therapy at IHI gets results in 3–5 sessions.
Struggling with fatigue, weight gain, or mood swings? Dr. Miller uses advanced hormone panels to find the root cause and restore balance.
Comprehensive thyroid, adrenal, and sex hormone testing — we go beyond basic bloodwork to find what conventional medicine misses.
IBS, bloating, food sensitivities, leaky gut — our functional medicine approach heals your gut lining and restores digestive health.
Hormones affect everything: energy, weight, sleep, mood. IHI builds personalized hormone optimization plans that actually work.

emails.subject: What your [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] is actually telling you
emails.preview: There's something important in your assessment we want to share.
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

Thank you for completing the health assessment.

Your answers stood out to us — particularly around [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM]. That pattern comes up more often than most people realize, and it's rarely just one thing in isolation.

Here's something worth knowing:

When [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] persists despite doing everything right — eating well, sleeping enough, exercising — it usually means the body is compensating for an underlying imbalance that hasn't been identified yet.

Conventional labs check whether you're sick. Functional medicine asks why you feel the way you do — even when those labs come back normal.

That's the gap we work in at Integrated Health of Indiana.

We'd like to walk you through what we found in your assessment and what it could mean for you specifically.

Review your next steps: [BOOKING_LINK]

Take care,
The Care Team at Integrated Health of Indiana

emails.subject: Why [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] keeps coming back (even when you try everything)
emails.preview: Most approaches treat the signal. We look for the source.
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

Imagine your body is sending you a message every single day.

That message is [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM]. Most approaches silence the notification. They don't read the message.

That's not a criticism of anyone you've seen before. It's simply how most care systems are structured: identify the symptom, reduce it, move on.

Functional medicine starts with a different question: what is the body trying to regulate, and why is it struggling?

In our clinical experience, [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] combined with [SECONDARY_SYMPTOM] often traces back to disruptions in one of several interconnected systems — hormonal, digestive, neurological, or inflammatory. Which system matters enormously, because the approach changes completely depending on the answer.

Your assessment gave us a clear starting picture. The next step is a deeper conversation — not a sales pitch. Just a clinical look at what may actually be driving your experience.

When you're ready: [BOOKING_LINK]

Dr. Trevor Miller, D.C., IFMCP, L.Ac, CFMP
Integrated Health of Indiana

emails.subject: A patient with a similar pattern — what changed for her
emails.preview: Results vary, but this story might feel familiar.
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

I want to share something from a patient — we'll call her M.

She came in with a pattern similar to what you described: [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] for over [DURATION_OR_TRIGGER], plus [SECONDARY_SYMPTOM] that was affecting her work and her sleep. She'd had full bloodwork done twice. Everything came back normal. She was told it was probably stress.

We ran a different panel. What we found was a combination of hormonal dysregulation and gut permeability that standard tests don't screen for.

Once we addressed the actual mechanisms — not just the symptoms — her energy began returning within 8 weeks. By month four, she described it as "feeling like myself again for the first time in years."

Important: results vary significantly from person to person. We don't know yet what's driving your specific experience. That's exactly what a first consultation is designed to find out.

If her story resonates, the next step is a simple conversation: [BOOKING_LINK]

This is not a commitment. It's a chance to get clear answers.

Dr. Trevor Miller, D.C., IFMCP, L.Ac, CFMP
Integrated Health of Indiana

This email is for informational purposes only and does not constitute medical advice or establish a patient-provider relationship.

app_config.tagline: Total Health from the Inside Out

Chronic Fatigue & Low Energy: I'm exhausted even after a full night of sleep
I crash in the afternoon and need caffeine to function
My energy levels have declined over the past year
I feel tired during activities I used to enjoy
I wake up feeling unrefreshed most mornings
My fatigue is affecting my work and relationships
I've been told my labs are 'normal' but I still feel terrible
I feel drained after mild physical or mental effort
I rely on stimulants just to get through the day
I've been fatigued for more than 6 months
Headaches & Migraines: I get headaches more than twice per week
My headaches are severe enough to stop my daily activities
I experience light or sound sensitivity with my headaches
I've tried multiple medications with limited relief
My migraines are getting more frequent over time
I experience nausea or vomiting with my headaches
My headaches seem linked to hormones or my cycle
I get tension headaches at the base of my skull
Stress makes my headaches significantly worse
I've missed work or social events due to headaches
Hormone Imbalance: My mood shifts unpredictably throughout the month
I've gained weight despite no change in diet or exercise
I have irregular or painful periods
I experience hot flashes or night sweats
My hair is thinning or falling out more than usual
I feel anxious or depressed without a clear reason
My skin is dry, oily, or breaking out more than before
I have difficulty sleeping even when I'm tired
I suspect my hormones are off but my doctor says they're 'normal'
Digestive & Gut Issues: I experience bloating after most meals
I have irregular bowel movements (constipation or diarrhea)
Certain foods consistently make me feel worse
I've been diagnosed with IBS, Crohn's, or colitis
I have acid reflux or heartburn regularly
I feel nauseous or have stomach cramps frequently
I suspect I have food sensitivities but haven't been tested
My gut issues are affecting my quality of life
I've noticed a connection between my gut and my mood
Antibiotics or medications have disrupted my digestion
Back & Joint Pain: I have lower back pain that's been present for more than 3 months
My pain limits how much I can sit, stand, or move
I experience shooting pain down my leg (sciatica)
My joints ache in the morning and loosen up during the day
I've had spinal adjustments before but the pain keeps returning
I have neck pain that causes headaches or arm symptoms
My pain is worse after prolonged sitting or desk work
I've been told I need surgery but want to explore alternatives
Over-the-counter pain meds are becoming less effective
My back or joint pain is affecting my sleep
Brain Fog & Memory: I struggle to concentrate for more than 20–30 minutes
I frequently forget words, names, or what I just said
I feel mentally slow or like I'm 'thinking through mud'
My cognitive symptoms are worse in the afternoon
I have difficulty multitasking like I used to
I misplace things constantly and can't stay organized
Brain fog is affecting my performance at work
I've noticed cognitive changes over the past 1–2 years
My mental clarity is tied to how well I sleep or eat
I'm worried about early cognitive decline
Thyroid Problems: I feel cold all the time even when others are comfortable
My metabolism seems to have slowed significantly
I've been diagnosed with hypothyroidism or Hashimoto's
My thyroid medication isn't fully resolving my symptoms
I have unexplained weight gain despite eating well
My hair is dry, brittle, or falling out
I feel depressed or emotionally flat
I have constipation and dry skin
My doctor checks TSH but I still feel terrible
I suspect my thyroid isn't being tested comprehensively
Autoimmune Conditions: I have a diagnosed autoimmune condition (lupus, RA, MS, etc.)
My symptoms flare unpredictably and are hard to control
My medications have significant side effects
I want to address the root cause, not just suppress symptoms
I have unexplained inflammation throughout my body
My autoimmune symptoms began after a major stressor or illness
Food or environment seems to trigger my flares
I've had extensive testing with inconclusive results
Multiple specialists haven't found a satisfying explanation
I want a natural or integrative approach alongside my current care
Weight & Metabolism: I've tried multiple diets and can't lose weight permanently
I gain weight easily but struggle to lose it
I have intense sugar or carbohydrate cravings
I've been told I'm pre-diabetic or insulin resistant
I carry most of my weight around my abdomen
My weight has increased despite healthy habits
I suspect hormones are affecting my ability to lose weight
I feel hungry even shortly after eating
Losing weight is important to me but nothing has worked long-term
Anxiety & Mood: I feel anxious or on-edge most days
My mood fluctuates significantly throughout the week
I've been on antidepressants or anti-anxiety medication
I want to address the root cause of my mental health struggles
I experience panic attacks or intrusive thoughts
Stress affects my physical health significantly
My anxiety is worse at certain times of the month
I struggle to relax or 'shut off' my mind
I feel disconnected or emotionally numb
My mood and mental state are impacting my relationships
Children's Health: My child has recurring infections or immune issues
My child has been diagnosed with ADHD or autism spectrum disorder
My child has chronic digestive problems
My child has food allergies or sensitivities
My child's growth or development concerns me
My child has sleep problems or behavioral issues
I want a natural approach to my child's health
My child has been on antibiotics frequently
My child has skin conditions like eczema or rashes
I want to optimize my child's health proactively
Chronic Pain: I have pain that has persisted for more than 3 months
My pain is affecting my quality of life and daily activities
I've tried multiple treatments without lasting relief
Pain medications are becoming less effective or I want to reduce them
I have fibromyalgia or a similar widespread pain condition
My pain is limiting my ability to work or exercise
I experience nerve pain, burning, or tingling
My pain is worse with stress or poor sleep
I've had injuries that never fully healed
I want to understand and address the source of my pain

care_models.name: Functional Medicine Care Plan
care_models.description: Root cause analysis using advanced lab testing, personalized nutrition, lifestyle optimization, and natural therapies. Includes hormone, gut, and comprehensive metabolic panels.

care_models.name: Chiropractic Care Program
care_models.description: Holistic nervous system care to address spinal alignment, musculoskeletal pain, and neurological function. Session packages available including unlimited membership options.

care_models.name: Shockwave Therapy Program
care_models.description: FDA-cleared extracorporeal shockwave therapy for chronic tendon, muscle, and joint pain. Typically 3–5 sessions for lasting results without surgery or medication.

care_models.name: Hormone & Thyroid Optimization
care_models.description: Comprehensive hormone panel testing, including thyroid (TSH, T3, T4, antibodies), sex hormones, adrenal, and metabolic markers. Personalized restoration protocols.

care_models.name: Nutritional IV Therapy
care_models.description: Intravenous delivery of vitamins, minerals, and nutrients for rapid cellular uptake. Ideal for fatigue, immune support, athletic recovery, and micronutrient deficiency.
